distractors.off_target_set: Problems solvable by a single model; model soup (adding models without distinct roles); incompatible model combinations forced together
distractors.description: Items where combination adds no value over single model, or where combinations are incoherent

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND synthesis_quality_score >= 0.70
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
